blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Routes for /librarian/books-management, /librarian/qr-management, /librarian/excel-migration are not configured in App.tsx. The frontend-route-restructuring feature (milestone: frontend-routes) is still pending. Browser testing cannot proceed until routes are added.

staticAnalysis.typeScriptCompilation: npx tsc --noEmit passed with exit code 0

testingNotes.blockingReason: VAL-FRONTEND-006 requires browser testing to verify components render without console errors, but the librarian routes (books-management, qr-management, excel-migration) are not yet configured in App.tsx. The frontend-route-restructuring feature is part of the pending frontend-routes milestone.
